name: shuvgeist
description: CLI and local bridge tooling for Shuvgeist browser automation

scripts.package: npm run build && node ./scripts/package-cli.mjs && npm pack ../../dist-cli-package --pack-destination ../..
scripts.test: vitest run --config ../../vitest.config.ts --root ../.. tests/integration/bridge/headless-direct-cdp-runtime.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/bridge-autostart.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/cli-core-coverage.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/cli-core.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/cli-node-runtime.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/cli-status.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/direct-cdp-page-driver.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/direct-cdp-vision-baseline.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/discovery.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/launcher.test.ts tests/unit/bridge/skill-install.test.ts tests/unit/scripts/build-cli.test.ts tests/unit/scripts/package-cli.test.ts
